titles.title: Secret Mission: Sennyuu Sousakan wa Zettai ni Makenai!
しーくれっとみっしょん~潜入捜査官は絶対に負けない!~
Secret Mission: Undercover Agents Never Back Down!

data.title: Secret Mission: Sennyuu Sousakan wa Zettai ni Makenai!
data.title_english: Secret Mission: Undercover Agents Never Back Down!
data.title_japanese: しーくれっとみっしょん~潜入捜査官は絶対に負けない!~
data.synopsis:
Undercover agent Riko Ikazuchi and her partner Noma infiltrate an apartment that is also the hideout of a criminal organization. They pretend to be newlyweds. However, when the perpetrators don't hear any sounds coming from them at night, they become suspicious.

To convince the perpetrators that they are a married couple in love, they start touching each other and making noise...

(Source: TMDB)

data.synopsis: An animated series to promote the film Mikocchaken.

titles.title: Raise Unicorn no Kubisuji Ushiro no Hokuro ni Naritai
来世 ユニコーンの首筋後ろのホクロになりたい
Wanna Be Reborn as a Mole on the Back of the Unicorn’s Neck

data.title: Raise Unicorn no Kubisuji Ushiro no Hokuro ni Naritai
data.title_english: Wanna Be Reborn as a Mole on the Back of the Unicorn’s Neck
data.title_japanese: 来世 ユニコーンの首筋後ろのホクロになりたい
data.synopsis:
It's the day before the last performance by THE PARADISE. Three fans who have never met get trapped in an elevator. They talk about their favorite band member, Unicorn, while they wait to be rescued. For some reason, the air is tense. Then, a notification goes off on their phones.

(Source: Geidai Animation)
data.background: Graduation Work 2023 by Yuchen Liu, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation.

data.title: Izumi no Koe
data.synopsis:
A girl troubled by the threats in her home and the chaos of the outside world sits on a boat on a quiet lake. Her trauma, though suffocating at first, subsides as she finds refuge through her breathing.

(Source: Geidai Animation)
data.background: 1st year work 2023 by Saki Haruo, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation.

data.title: Shinobanai! Crypto Ninja Sakuya
data.title_japanese: 忍ばない! クリプトニンジャ咲耶
data.synopsis:
The Crypto Scroll enshrined in the ninja city of Kouka has been stolen, leading to a battle royal among ninja. Sakuya, Nemu, and Xiaolan were living their daily lives until they must unite their forces.

(Source: ANN)

data.title: Hatsukoi Jikan
data.synopsis: Rin is an ordinary student who has, so far, spent his time studying rather than with love and friends. This only changes when he meets the lovely Ena, who seems to live in a completely different world. Rumour has it that she has several boyfriends at the same time and has slept with over 100 men, but she's not exactly the smartest either, which is why Rin agrees to tutor her. Soon, his lessons are crowned with success, and as a thank you for improving her grades, Ena has come up with something special for the nerd...

titles.title: Ane Jiyoku Tsukushi: Neesan no Shitagi
姉辱尽くし ~姉さんの下着~

data.title: Ane Jiyoku Tsukushi: Neesan no Shitagi
data.title_japanese: 姉辱尽くし ~姉さんの下着~
data.synopsis:
Ema, the student council president, is a quiet, beautiful, and perfect girl. Her younger sister, Ruka, enjoys popularity comparable to that of an idol and is always the center of attention. Despite this, their younger brother Mizuki is rather ordinary.

Since childhood, Mizuki has been the target of teasing from Ema and treated demanding by Ruka. However, his life takes a turn when he enters a romantic relationship.
